vocab.example: 我们要积极参与学校活动。
被误会后，他心里感到很委屈。
这孩子非常顽皮，总是捉弄人。
为了取得好成绩，他加倍努力。
妈妈用温柔的声音安慰我。
甲组和乙组展开了激烈的比赛。
老师辛苦培育每一位学生。
通过努力，他的成绩有了很大的提高。
经过休息，他的身体已经恢复健康。
知错能改比不犯错更重要。

vocab.meaning: Well up in one's heart / Surge into mind
vocab.example: 看着旧照片，往事纷纷涌上心头。
他完成了作业，并复习了课文。
大家都在默默地为他祈祷。

sentences.text: 老师经常提问，同学们都争先恐后地举手回答。
sentences.description: Students eagerly vie with each other to raise hands and answer the teacher's questions.

sentences.text: 看到学生们在课室里玩闹，林老师板着脸，插着腰站在课室门外。
sentences.description: Teacher Lin stood outside the classroom with a stern face and hands on hips.

sentences.text: 下午，天空万里无云，火辣辣的太阳在头顶上烘烤着。
sentences.description: Cloudless sky in the afternoon with scorching sun baking overhead.

sentences.text: 我的心中像是打翻了五味瓶，酸甜苦辣咸交织在一起。
sentences.description: Overwhelmed with mixed feelings like a overturned jar of spices.

sentences.text: 看到心爱的小狗病得那么严重，我难过得泣不成声。
sentences.description: Choked up with tears seeing my beloved puppy so seriously ill.

辛勤.zh: 农民们在田野里辛勤地劳作，用汗水换来丰硕的果实。
辛勤.en: Farmers work hard in the fields, exchanging their sweat for fruitful harvests.

辛勤.zh: 老师们默默无闻地辛勤耕耘，培养了一批又一批优秀的学生。
辛勤.en: Teachers work hard and quietly, cultivating batch after batch of outstanding students.

辛勤.zh: 经过多年辛勤地付出与努力，他终于建立起了属于自己的事业。
辛勤.en: After years of hardworking dedication and effort, he finally established a business of his own.

辛勤.zh: 环卫工人辛勤地打扫着城市的街道，换来了干净整洁的环境。
辛勤.en: Sanitation workers tirelessly sweep city streets, bringing about a clean and tidy environment.

辛勤.zh: 只有付出辛勤的汗水，我们才能在秋天的收获季节得到回报。
辛勤.en: Only by expending hard sweat can we get returns during autumn's harvest season.

积极.zh: 课堂上同学们都积极举手发言，气氛显得十分活跃。
积极.en: In class, students actively raised their hands to speak, and the atmosphere seemed very lively.

积极.zh: 面对生活中的挫折与困难，我们应该保持积极乐观的态度。
积极.en: In the face of setbacks and difficulties in life, we should maintain an active and optimistic attitude.

积极.zh: 学校鼓励大家积极参加各种社会公益活动，培养奉献精神。
积极.en: The school encourages everyone to actively participate in various social welfare activities to cultivate a spirit of dedication.

积极.zh: 政府正在积极采取措施，以应对近期突发的公共卫生事件。
积极.en: The government is actively taking measures to cope with recent sudden public health events.

积极.zh: 只有积极主动地去寻找解决办法，问题才有可能得到妥善解决。
积极.en: Only by actively seeking solution methods is it possible for problems to be properly resolved.

委屈.zh: 受到别人的误解之后，她心里感到十分委屈，忍不住流下了眼泪。
委屈.en: After being misunderstood by others, she felt extremely aggrieved in her heart and couldn't help shedding tears.

委屈.zh: 明明不是自己的错却被老师批评，他感到委屈得说不出话来。
委屈.en: Clearly it was not his own fault but he was criticized by the teacher; he felt so aggrieved that he couldn't speak.

委屈.zh: 妈妈温柔地拥抱了委屈的孩子，耐心听他倾诉心中的苦水。
委屈.en: Mom gently hugged the aggrieved child, listening patiently as he poured out the bitterness in his heart.

委屈.zh: 遇到委屈时要学会冷静沟通，而不是一味地发脾气生闷气。
委屈.en: When feeling aggrieved, learn to communicate calmly rather than blindly losing your temper or sulking.

委屈.zh: 为了整个团队的利益，他宁愿委屈自己也要配合大家的安排。
委屈.en: For the benefit of the whole team, he would rather wrong himself to cooperate with everyone's arrangements.

甲.zh: 在辩论比赛中，甲队和乙队展开了一场精彩绝伦的激烈对决。
甲.en: In the debate competition, Team A and Team B engaged in a wonderful and fierce match.

甲.zh: 这款新型汽车在安全性评估报告中获得了甲级的优秀评价。
甲.en: This new type of car obtained an A-level excellent rating in the safety evaluation report.

甲.zh: 老师把全班同学分为甲乙两个小组，分别进行实验和对比。
甲.en: The teacher divided all students into Groups A and B to conduct experiments and comparisons separately.

甲.zh: 指甲的长短和卫生状况直接反映了一个人的个人卫生习惯。
甲.en: The length and hygienic condition of fingernails directly reflect a person's personal hygiene habits.

甲.zh: 古代的战士们穿上坚固的铠甲，英勇无畏地奔赴沙场作战。
甲.en: Ancient warriors put on sturdy armor and rushed to the battlefield to fight courageously and fearlessly.

顽皮.zh: 那个顽皮的小男孩总是喜欢偷偷把同学的铅笔藏起来。
顽皮.en: That naughty little boy always likes to secretly hide his classmates' pencils.

顽皮.zh: 顽皮的小猴子在树枝之间攀爬跳跃，吸引了许多游客逗留。
顽皮.en: The playful little monkey climbed and jumped between tree branches, attracting many tourists to stay.

顽皮.zh: 虽然他平时有些顽皮捣蛋，但在关键时刻却非常懂得关心人。
顽皮.en: Although he is usually somewhat naughty and mischievous, he knows how to care about people very well at critical moments.

顽皮.zh: 老师耐心地教育那些顽皮的学生，引导他们养成良好习惯。
顽皮.en: The teacher patiently educated those naughty students, guiding them to form good habits.

顽皮.zh: 看着照片里小时候那个顽皮的自己，他忍不住微微笑了笑。
顽皮.en: Looking at his naughty childhood self in the photo, he couldn't help but smile slightly.

加倍.zh: 既然知道了自己的不足，今后我就必须要加倍努力学习。
加倍.en: Now that I know my own deficiencies, I must redouble my efforts in learning in the future.

加倍.zh: 看到别人都在进步，他决定付出加倍的汗水去追赶大家的步伐。
加倍.en: Seeing everyone making progress, he decided to expend double the sweat to catch up with everyone's pace.

加倍.zh: 面对严峻的挑战，我们需要加倍小心，防止出现任何小的纰漏。
加倍.en: In the face of severe challenges, we need to be doubly careful to prevent any small flaws.

加倍.zh: 只要你真心待人，别人也一定会加倍地关心和回报你。
加倍.en: As long as you treat people with sincerity, others will definitely care for and repay you twice as much.

加倍.zh: 节假日加班的员工可以获得公司发放的加倍薪水与补助。
加倍.en: Employees working overtime on holidays can receive double salary and subsidies issued by the company.

温柔.zh: 妈妈用温柔的眼神注视着睡梦中的婴儿，脸上洋溢着母爱。
温柔.en: Mom looked at the sleeping baby with gentle eyes, her face beaming with maternal love.

温柔.zh: 微风吹过树梢，传来一阵阵温柔的沙沙声，令人心旷神怡。
温柔.en: A gentle breeze blew through the treetops, bringing bursts of gentle rustling sounds that made one feel relaxed and happy.

温柔.zh: 老师说话声音非常温柔，同学们都非常喜欢听她讲课。
温柔.en: The teacher speaks with a very gentle voice, and classmates all like listening to her lectures very much.

温柔.zh: 她性格温柔善良，无论遇到谁总是带着甜甜的礼貌微笑。
温柔.en: She has a gentle and kind character, always carrying a sweet and polite smile no matter who she meets.

温柔.zh: 请对这些脆弱的小动物温柔一点，千万不要伤害它们。
温柔.en: Please be a bit more gentle with these fragile small animals and never hurt them.

乙.zh: 经过多轮激烈比拼，甲组最终以微弱的优势击败了乙组。
乙.en: After multiple rounds of fierce competition, Group A ultimately defeated Group B with a slight advantage.

乙.zh: 合同上明确规定了甲方和乙方各自需要承担的法律责任。
乙.en: The contract clearly stipulates the respective legal responsibilities that Party A and Party B need to bear.

乙.zh: 老师让甲同学朗读课文的前半段，乙同学接着朗读后半段。
乙.en: The teacher asked Student A to read the first half of the text, and Student B to continue reading the second half.

乙.zh: 在化学实验课上，我们需要把甲溶液和乙溶液进行按比例混合。
乙.en: In the chemistry experiment class, we need to mix Solution A and Solution B proportionally.

乙.zh: 医生提醒大家要注意预防乙型肝炎等常见的传染性疾病。
乙.en: The doctor reminded everyone to pay attention to preventing common infectious diseases such as Hepatitis B.

培育.zh: 园丁们用心地浇水施肥，精心培育着花园里的每一株幼苗。
培育.en: Gardeners water and fertilize attentively, meticulously cultivating every seedling in the garden.

培育.zh: 学校致力于培育德智体美劳全面发展的优秀社会主义建设者。
培育.en: The school is committed to cultivating outstanding builders with comprehensive development in moral, intellectual, physical, aesthetic, and labor education.

培育.zh: 农业专家成功培育出了抗旱能力强且产量极高的新型水稻。
培育.en: Agricultural experts successfully cultivated a new type of rice with strong drought resistance and extremely high yield.

培育.zh: 家庭环境对培育孩子的健全人格和良好习惯起着关键的作用。
培育.en: The family environment plays a key role in cultivating a child's sound personality and good habits.

培育.zh: 科技企业需要大力培育创新人才，才能在市场竞争中站稳脚跟。
培育.en: Tech companies need to vigorously cultivate innovative talent in order to gain a firm foothold in market competition.

成绩.zh: 经过长期的刻苦复习，他在期末考试中取得了优异的成绩。
成绩.en: After long-term painstaking revision, he achieved superior grades in the final examination.

成绩.zh: 我们不能因为取得了一点点成绩就感到骄傲自满、停止不前。
成绩.en: We cannot feel proud, self-satisfied, and stop moving forward just because we achieved a tiny bit of result.

成绩.zh: 这名运动健将在奥运会上打破了世界纪录，创造了辉煌的成绩。
成绩.en: This athlete broke the world record at the Olympic Games, creating brilliant achievements.

成绩.zh: 老师在家长会上展示了同学们本学期取得的各项巨大成绩。
成绩.en: The teacher displayed the various huge achievements classmates obtained this semester at the parent-teacher meeting.

成绩.zh: 只要你肯付出持之以恒的努力，就一定能够取得理想的成绩。
成绩.en: As long as you are willing to expend persistent effort, you will surely be able to achieve ideal results.

恢复.zh: 经过长期的精心治疗与休养，他的身体健康终于完全恢复了。
恢复.en: After long-term careful treatment and recuperation, his physical health finally fully recovered.

恢复.zh: 暴雨过后，城市交通设施在工作人员的抢修下恢复了正常运行。
恢复.en: After the rainstorm, city traffic facilities resumed normal operation under emergency repairs by workers.

恢复.zh: 听到这个好消息之后，他原本沮丧的情绪立刻恢复了高涨。
恢复.en: Hearing this good news, his originally depressed mood immediately restored to high spirits.

恢复.zh: 政府正在大力推动经济复苏，帮助受灾地区恢复生产和生活。
恢复.en: The government is vigorously promoting economic recovery to help disaster areas restore production and daily life.

恢复.zh: 请你先冷静下来，等情绪恢复平稳之后我们再谈论这件事。
恢复.en: Please calm down first and wait until your emotions restore to stability before we talk about this matter.

诗.zh: 这首古诗运用了精炼的语言，传神地描绘了秋天乡村的风景。
诗.en: This ancient poem applied concise language, vividly depicting the countryside scenery in autumn.

诗.zh: 诗人站在高山之巅，诗兴大发并即兴创作了一首脍炙人口的诗歌。
诗.en: The poet stood at the top of the high mountain, inspired to compose a popular poem on the spot.

诗.zh: 语文老师要求大家在背诵古诗的时候，要深入体会诗人的情感。
诗.en: The Chinese teacher required everyone to deeply appreciate the poet's emotions when reciting ancient poems.

诗.zh: 这幅美丽的风景画充满了诗情画意，令人心驰神往、陶醉其中。
诗.en: This beautiful landscape painting is full of poetic and picturesque charm, making people long for and be captivated by it.

诗.zh: 他从小就非常喜欢朗诵现代诗歌，并在比赛中获得过许多奖项。
诗.en: Since childhood, he liked reciting modern poetry very much and won many awards in competitions.

犯错.zh: 常言道人非圣贤孰能无过，每个人在成长过程中都会犯错。
犯错.en: As the saying goes, no one is a sage, who can be faultless; everyone makes mistakes during the growth process.

犯错.zh: 犯错并不可怕，可怕的是犯错之后不知悔改并且一错再错。
犯错.en: Making mistakes is not terrible; what is terrible is not repenting after making mistakes and making error after error.

犯错.zh: 意识到自己犯错之后，他立刻真诚地向受害者做出了道歉。
犯错.en: After realizing that he had made a mistake, he immediately made a sincere apology to the victim.

犯错.zh: 老师对犯错的学生进行了耐心的说服教育，而不是盲目体罚。
犯错.en: The teacher conducted patient persuasive education on students who made mistakes, rather than blind corporal punishment.

犯错.zh: 我们应该从自己每一次犯错的经历中吸取教训，避免重蹈覆辙。
犯错.en: We should draw lessons from every experience of our own making mistakes to avoid repeating the same disastrous road.

钻进.zh: 调皮的小猫一溜烟地钻进了沙发底下，怎么叫都不肯出来。
钻进.en: The playful cat darted under the sofa like smoke and refused to come out no matter how called.

钻进.zh: 外面刮起了刺骨的寒风，他连忙加快脚步钻进了温暖的被窝。
钻进.en: Bone-chilling wind blew outside, and he hastily quickened his pace to slip into the warm bed.

钻进.zh: 遇到不懂的学术问题，他就一个人钻进图书馆研究大半天。
钻进.en: When encountering academic questions he didn't understand, he would dive into the library alone to study for half a day.

钻进.zh: 小老鼠动作非常灵敏，嗖地一下就钻进了墙角的缝隙里面。
钻进.en: The little mouse's movements were very agile, swooshing right into the gap at the corner of the wall.

钻进.zh: 汽车钻进了长长的海底隧道，四周的灯光闪烁着耀眼的光芒。
钻进.en: The car entered the long undersea tunnel, and the lights all around flashed with dazzling rays.

涌上心头.zh: 看着老照片里逝去的童年美好时光，一股思念之情涌上心头。
涌上心头.en: Looking at the past good times of childhood in old photos, a feeling of longing welled up in my heart.

涌上心头.zh: 听到这个突如其来的噩耗，无比悲伤的情绪立刻涌上心头。
涌上心头.en: Hearing this sudden bad news, feelings of extreme sadness immediately welled up in my heart.

涌上心头.zh: 登上最高领奖台的那一刻，多年来的酸甜苦辣纷纷涌上心头。
涌上心头.en: The moment he stepped onto the highest podium, all the ups and downs of many years welled up in his heart.

涌上心头.zh: 走在久别重逢的家乡小路上，熟悉的温馨感不由自主地涌上心头。
涌上心头.en: Walking on the long-lost hometown path after a long separation, a familiar feeling of warmth involuntarily welled up in my heart.

涌上心头.zh: 面对老师温和的关怀，做错事的他惭愧与悔恨的情绪涌上心头。
涌上心头.en: Facing the teacher's gentle care, feelings of shame and remorse welled up in his heart for doing wrong.

并.zh: 我们不仅要认真听讲，并且要在课后及时复习巩固知识。
并.en: We should not only listen carefully, but also review and consolidate knowledge in a timely manner after class.

并.zh: 面对对手的严厉质疑，他冷静地作出了回应并提出了反驳。
并.en: Facing the opponent's severe questioning, he responded calmly and raised a rebuttal.

并.zh: 事情的发展并不是像你想象的那么简单，我们需要全面分析。
并.en: The development of things is by no means as simple as you imagine; we need a comprehensive analysis.

并.zh: 他把分散在各处的资料整理齐备，并统一打包发送给客户。
并.en: He organized the scattered materials completely, bundled them together, and sent them to the client.

并.zh: 这种新技术将大大提高生产效率，并显著地降低能源消耗。
并.en: This new technology will greatly improve production efficiency and significantly reduce energy consumption.

宣布.zh: 校长在全校大会上隆重宣布了本次田径运动会的获奖名单。
宣布.en: The principal solemnly announced the winners' list of this track and field meet at the school assembly.

宣布.zh: 经过长达数小时的激烈谈判，双方终于宣布达成合作协议。
宣布.en: After hours of fierce negotiations, both sides finally announced that they had reached a cooperation agreement.

宣布.zh: 裁判员高高举起胜者的手臂，向全场观众宣布了比赛结果。
宣布.en: The referee raised the winner's arm high, announcing the match results to the whole audience.

宣布.zh: 气象局提前向全社会宣布了即将到来的台风警报与防护措施。
宣布.en: The meteorological bureau announced the upcoming typhoon warning and protection measures to the whole society in advance.

宣布.zh: 随着主裁判的一声哨响，他正式宣布本次国际足球联赛闭幕。
宣布.en: With a whistle blow from the head referee, he officially announced the closing of this international soccer league.

祈祷.zh: 面对突如其来的自然灾害，全国人民都在默默地为受灾群众祈祷。
祈祷.en: Facing sudden natural disasters, people across the country were silently praying for the affected public.

祈祷.zh: 妈妈闭上双眼合十双手，真诚地祈祷全家人都能够健康平安。
祈祷.en: Mom closed her eyes and put her hands together, sincerely praying that the whole family could be healthy and safe.

祈祷.zh: 在风暴来临的前夕，船员们聚集在甲板上祈祷航程顺风顺水。
祈祷.en: On the eve of the storm's arrival, crew members gathered on the deck to pray for smooth sailing on the voyage.

祈祷.zh: 人们在古老的教堂里点燃蜡烛，低头为世界和平而虔诚祈祷。
祈祷.en: People lit candles in the ancient church, bowing their heads to piously pray for world peace.

祈祷.zh: 医生正在手术室里进行抢救，家属们在走廊里焦急地祈祷奇迹发生。
祈祷.en: Doctors were performing emergency rescue in the operating room, while family members anxiously prayed in the hallway for a miracle to happen.
